name: sleep
readme:
Short:        Suspend execution for an interval
Type:         util/cli
Architecture: m68k-amigaos >= 3.0
Uploader:     duncan (at) bowring (dot) us
Author:       University of California, Berkeley (ported by Duncan Bowring)
Version:      1.29

sleep - Suspend execution for an interval

Original author: University of California, Berkeley
Ported by Duncan Bowring using amiport (AI-assisted porting toolkit).
Project: https://github.com/bdgscotland/amiport

Cross-compiled for AmigaOS 3.x (68000+).
Tested in vamos emulator and FS-UAE.

Usage:
  sleep [options] [arguments]

Includes full source code (original POSIX and ported Amiga versions)
porting_notes: Port from OpenBSD. Timing implemented via AmigaOS Delay() mapped to 50Hz ticks (fractional seconds rounded to nearest tick, minimum 1 tick). Applied standard amiport transformations: exit codes mapped to AmigaOS conventions (0/10/20), __stack cookie set to 8192. 25/25 FS-UAE tests pass.
